'''Dav Kathis''' was an officer of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and later a highly regarded [[free-trader]] in the [[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]], as well as husband to [[Leanna Carella]] and father of a son. Still loyal to the ideals of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Kathis refused to serve as an agent of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. This did not stop [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]] from kidnapping him and trying to make him confess.

==Biography==
Dav Kathis was an officer of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], but he wanted to become the captain of an independent freighter and a [[free-trader]].<ref name="Stock Ships" />

At one point, the [[Bureau of Ships and Services/Legends|Bureau of Ships and Services]] of [[Nigel III]] offered a [[Kazellis-class light freighter]], the ''[[Longrunner]]'', in open auction. Kathis resigned from the Navy, bought the ship and began his dream life of freetrading through the [[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]]. He was esteemed along the people he met.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Kathis married a former agent of [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]], [[Leanna Carella]], and fathered a son with her. The three of them lived in the ''Longrunner.''<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Agents of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] repeatedly approached Kathis, wanting him to provide them with valuable information. However, Kathis refused, being still convinced that the Empire was not evil at all.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Later, Empire-aligned agents of [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]] mistakenly believed Kathis to be an spy for the Alliance, providing them with information about the [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]]. A particularly paranoid COMPNOR leader ordered to kidnap Kathis (who disappeared without even his wife knowing). Under nearly-fatal [[Torture/Legends|torture]], Kathis did not reveal anything of interest — prompting the COMPNOR agents to target Carella as the potential spy.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Meanwhile, Carella had taken over her husband's business and traveled through his usual areas of operation along with their child. Carella was actively trying to find any lead to Kathis' location.<ref name="Stock Ships" />
